# Maktab One — School Management System

> Maktab One is a self-hosted, open-source school management system for K-12 schools, colleges, and educational institutions. It provides student management, fee collection and invoicing, academic session tracking, RBAC security, reports and analytics, and a guardian portal.

## Key Features

- **Student Management**: Enroll, track, and manage student profiles with bulk CSV import, auto-generated registration numbers (STU-XXX), and full academic history.
- **Fee Collection & Invoicing**: Auto-generate invoices, record payments, track defaulters, manage concessions and discounts with real-time balance updates.
- **Academic Management**: Configure sessions, classes, sections, subjects, and end-of-year promotions with full academic journey tracking.
- **RBAC & Security**: 46 granular permissions across 7 modules. JWT authentication with OTP verification, hashed refresh token rotation, and CSRF double-submit cookie protection.
- **Reports & Analytics**: Financial reports, defaulter analysis, discount summaries, collection reports, and real-time dashboard metrics.
- **Guardian Portal**: Automated guardian account setup, email invitations, password reset flows, and a dedicated guardian dashboard for fee tracking and student progress.

## Technical Stack

- **Backend**: Express.js 5, Prisma 7 (ORM), PostgreSQL, Zod validation, TypeScript
- **Frontend**: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TanStack Query, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui
- **Security**: JWT with HTTP-only cookies, OTP email verification, CSRF double-submit cookie, hashed refresh token rotation, Argon2 password hashing
- **Deployment**: Docker Compose, self-hosted on VPS with Caddy reverse proxy and wildcard SSL

## Architecture

Maktab One follows a modular monolith architecture with 17 feature modules (auth, users, students, guardians, classes, sections, sessions, fees, fee-heads, invoices, payments, discounts, concessions, promotions, roles, audit logs, dashboard). The backend uses a controller-service-repository pattern with centralized error handling and Swagger API documentation.

## Pricing

See /pricing.md for detailed pricing information.
